articles.title: The Day After 28.0: Oilers score nine and feel fine after offensive breakout
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers needed that. They really needed that. About everything that could’ve gone their way Thursday night did in their 9-4 walloping of the Seattle Kraken, as Connor McDavid notched his 13th career hat trick, four players posted three or more points, and many a milestone was hit. For McDavid, he’s faced some criticism all…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Connor McDavid’s hat trick, Ryan Nugent-Hopkins quietly solid, and Oilers getting more from Vasily Podkolzin
articles.description: We didn’t have to wait long for the Oilers and Kraken to square off again after what was a spicy afternoon in Seattle on Saturday. That game started to boil over a little bit, and it was nice to see two Pacific Division teams getting fired up and getting after it. Ultimately, the better team…
articles.author: baggedmilk

articles.title: No revenge for Seattle as Oilers hammer Kraken 9-4: Recap, Highlights, and Reaction
articles.description: The Edmonton Oilers are back. On Thursday evening, the Oilers smashed the Seattle Kraken 9-4 in a much-needed win. The Oilers are now 12-11-5 this season with three more games on this five-game home stand. Just over seven minutes into the game, the Oilers took a 1-0 lead thanks to a short-side shot by Connor…
articles.author: Ryley Delaney

articles.title: Real Life Podcast: The Dave Chappelle show disaster, Jay’s trip to New York, and job interviews
articles.description: Thursday afternoon means a fresh episode of Real Life was recorded, edited, and is ready to help you wrap up the week. On today’s podcast, the guys discussed the Dave Chappelle show at Rogers Place, Jay’s new dad hat, his trip to New York, and more. The guys kicked off the Thursday episode of Real…
articles.author: Real Life Podcast

articles.title: GDB 28.0: Oilers Need to Get Kraken (7 PM MT, SNW)
articles.description: Good news Oilersnation: The Edmonton Oilers have played quite well in four of their last five games. Bad news: They only have two wins in those five games. The Oilers need to string together some wins, and Seattle is a team they need to beat. Their last five games saw them lose 2-1 in OT…
articles.author: Jason Gregor

articles.title: Scenes From Morning Skate: Pickard gets the start despite Skinner’s recent performance
articles.description: Calvin Pickard is starting on Thursday against the Seattle Kraken, and it’s about time. Not because Stuart Skinner has been bad—he hasn’t. That shutout against Seattle five days ago was his best performance of the season. He was solid against Minnesota. And he’s been giving the Oilers a chance to win lately, which is exactly…
articles.author: Caprice St. Pierre

articles.title: Surely the NHL won’t use Italy rink concerns as a reason pull players from Olympics… right?
articles.description: The NHL’s relationship with its players playing on the international stage is… convoluted at best. The league didn’t send any of its players until the 1998 Olympics, forming a relationship with the international hockey community that ran unabated for two decades. The Czech Republic would take the Gold Medal that year, and one has to…
articles.author: Zach Laing

articles.title: Pre-Scout: Kraken coming off days of practice eyeing revenge against Oilers
articles.description: Things have been quiet in Kraken land lately.  It makes sense why. Seattle hasn’t played since the Oilers shut them out 4-0 on home ice on Saturday.  Their power play went 0-6 on the day, and they were shut out for the second time in their last three games. That same PP is 0/14 in…
articles.author: Michael Menzies

articles.title: McDavid's hat trick ties Messier; Oilers rout Kraken
articles.description: Connor McDavid had his 13th career hat trick to tie Mark Messier for fourth in Oilers history in Edmonton's 9-4 romp over the Seattle Kraken on Thursday night.

articles.title: Sharks’ Jeff Skinner to return after 10-game absence
articles.description: Skinner has four goals and seven points through 17 games with the Sharks this season.
articles.author: Hunter Crowther

articles.title: Kings’ Drew Doughty to return after seven-game absence
articles.description: Warren Foegele and Phillip Danault are also expected to be in the lineup for their Dec. 4 game against the Blackhawks.
articles.author: Hunter Crowther
